case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK VS. MANHUNG S YEUNG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS RE: VENUE & REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.
